name: Autoresearch Task
description: Investigate and improve the ranking/retrieval quality metrics (ndcg and precision) visible in the smoke-test-agent evals, which show scores well below 1.0 (ndcg ~0.52-0.71, precision ~0.38-0.55). Review the query understanding, document scoring, and ranking logic to identify gaps between current behavior and ideal relevance ordering.
